name: ASTROPHYZ
bio: Astrophyz bends low-end frequencies to map out stellar constellations, synthesizing heavy drum beats with ethereal pad networks.

name: QUASAR BEATS
bio: Merging vintage hardware samples with planetary atmospheric static to construct deep, dusty audio excursions.

name: NEBULA DRIFT
bio: Ethereal, nostalgic, and deep. Nebula Drift constructs sprawling synthwaves designed for solitary mid-space voyages.
